tasks.title: Add CLAUDE.md to .gitignore
tasks.notes: Added CLAUDE.md to .gitignore. Note: file is already tracked in git, so git check-ignore returns non-zero for tracked files, but .gitignore entry is in place to prevent future accidental commits.

tasks.title: Add blank string validation helper and unit test (gh-toy-v6z)
tasks.notes: Added isBlankOrEmpty(s: string): boolean to validation.ts. Added 3 test cases covering empty string, whitespace-only, and valid non-blank string. All 24 tests pass.

tasks.title: Add --version flag to CLI entry point (gh-toy-4ef)
tasks.notes: Added --version and -v flag check in src/index.ts. Prints 'fleet-e2e-toy v1.0.0' and exits 0. All 24 tests still pass.

tasks.title: Add help command and --help flag (gh-toy-kbk)
tasks.notes: Added help command and --help/-h flag. All tests pass.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 1 — CLI Features & Input Validation
